name: Water Splash
description: a wet splash of stepping or falling into water

ai.prompt: A body/foot entering water: a rich, wet splash with droplet spray and a short bubbling settle, full-bodied. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
